channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Buzzer-beater: Mitty edges Valley Christian on Isaac Turner’s 3-pointer
item.description: Isaac Turner's shot as time expires lifts Mitty to a victory at home over Valley Christian to open WCAL play.
item.dc:creator: Glenn Reeves, The Mercury News

item.title: Aggies avoid upset at San Jose State, 85-78
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - In their first game of the season as a ranked team, the Utah State basketball team avoided a major upset at San Jose State Tuesday night. Mason Falslev had 17 points and seven rebounds, Tucker Anderson added 15 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sharks start slow as ugly streak against Golden Knights continues
item.description: San Jose Sharks fall behind by two goals to Vegas Golden Knights on two occasions and never fully recover in a 4-2 loss at SAP Center.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ready for takeoff: Duke star Cooper Flagg puts highlight-dunk signature on Pittsburgh win
item.description: Duke star freshman Cooper Flagg had a highlight-reel moment with a coast-to-coast dunk while being fouled Tuesday against Pittsburgh.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick says his family evacuated and people are 'freaking out' due to LA wildfires
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick says members of his family were among those in Southern California forced to evacuate their homes due to a wildfire that was being whipped by strong winds around Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Stefan Stevenson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nick Sorensen ousted as 49ers make another defensive coordinator swap
item.description: The 49ers are moving on to their fifth defensive coordinator in six seasons as Nick Sorensen is ousted by coach Kyle Shanahan.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Padres' late owner's widow sues for control of team from his siblings
item.description: The widow of deceased team owner Peter Seidler has filed a lawsuit against his two brothers in attempt to take control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets center Nikola Jokic sidelined for game against Celtics due to illness
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Three-time NBA MVP Nikola Jokic was sidelined for Denver’s clash with Jayson Tatum and the Boston Celtics on Tuesday night because of an illness. The Nuggets center went from probable to questionable to out over the course of the day.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Verlander and the Giants agree to a $15 million, 1-year contract, AP source says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Justin Verlander and the San Francisco Giants have agreed to a $15 million, one-year contract, according to a person with direct knowledge of the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity Tuesday because the deal was pending a physical.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings lineman's wife says she was 'heckled, touched and called names' during game vs Lions
item.description: The wife of Minnesota Vikings offensive lineman Dalton Risner revealed in a video on Sunday she was incessantly heckled by Detroit Lions fans last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler withdraws from another tournament, hopes to play at Pebble Beach
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Scottie Scheffler withdrew from The American Express on Monday, saying his right hand has not fully recovered from minor surgery to repair a glass puncture over Christmas. Scheffler, the world's No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Dakota State wins 10th FCS title as Miller accounts for 4 TDs in 35-32 win over Montana State
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Cam Miller ran for two touchdowns and threw for two more in his 54th consecutive start as North Dakota State's quarterback, and the Bison won their record 10th Football Championship Subdivision title, beating top-seeded and previously undefeated Montana State 35-32 on Monday nig
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavericks guard Kyrie Irving out due to bulging disk in his back, no timeline for return
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Dallas guard Kyrie Irving is expected to miss one to two weeks with a bulging disk in his back, and Mavericks coach Jason Kidd said a timeline for his return was not immediately known.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: Bears need leaders on the line alongside Caleb Williams in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — While the 2024 season was every single bit of a disaster, the Chicago Bears' win over the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field Sunday provided a glimmer of hope. It could also double as a springboard into a pivotal offseason.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers stars reflect on how season badly derailed
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- As the San Francisco 49ers packed up their lockers at Levi's Stadium on Monday, players told reporters about how they will move forward into next season. Tight end George Kittle summed up the season as "disappointing.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bears seek permission to interview Cowboys' Mike McCarthy for head coaching vacancy
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears have sought permission to interview Dallas Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and are awaiting a response from the Cowboys, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Final field for 2025 Farmers Insurance Open in San Diego shaping up
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open is set to take place in San Diego from January 22-25, 2025, featuring a field of major championship winners, past winners, and players with San Diego ties. Tickets went on sale in October.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos' 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers, who lost quarterback Jordan Love and wide receiver Christian Watson to injuries on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State holds off Fresno State to improve to 14-1
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State is proving to be the team to beat in the Mountain West Conference this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sensabaugh pours in 34 as Jazz crush Miami, 136-100
item.description: MIAMI (AP) - Brice Sensabaugh scored a career-high 34 points, John Collins finished with 24, and the Utah Jazz snapped a five-game losing streak with a 136-100 rout over the Miami Heat on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
